# Video Extension

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/videoDuration`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/videoDuration/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-CLtF_Cus.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-video-extend`
- `query-video-extend-single`
- `query-video-extend-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/video-extend`
- `/v1/videos/video-extend/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Video Extension",zh:"视频延长"},endpoints:[{id:"create-video-extend",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/video-extend",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Video extension refers to extending the duration of text-to-video/image-to-video results. Each extension can add 4 to 5 seconds, and the total video duration cannot exceed 3 minutes.",zh:"视频续写功能是指对文生视频/图生视频的结果进行时长延展。每次可延展 4-5 秒，视频总时长不能超过 3 分钟。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"video_id",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Video ID",zh:"视频 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Supports video IDs generated by the text-to-video, the image-to-video and the video extension interface (it cannot exceed 3 minutes).",zh:"- 支持通过文本、图片和视频延长生成的视频的ID（原视频不能超过3分钟）"},{en:"- Only videos generated by V1.0, V1.5, and V1.6 models are supported.",zh:"- 仅支持V1.0、V1.5、V1.6模型生成的视频"},{en:"Please note that based on the current cleanup policy, videos will be cleared 30 days after generation, and extension will not be possible",zh:"请注意，基于目前的清理策略、视频生成30天之后会被清理，则无法进行延长"}]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Text Prompt",zh:"文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"negative_prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Negative text prompt",zh:"负向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"cfg_scale",type:"float",required:!1,default:"0.5",description:{en:"Prompt reference strength. The higher the value, the stronger the reference to the prompt.",zh:"提示词参考强度，数值越大参考强度越大"},notes:[{en:"Value range: [0, 1]",zh:"取值范围：[0, 1]"}]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the task results. If configured, the server will actively notify when the task status changes.",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知"},notes:[{en:"- For specific message schema, see [Callback Protocol](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)",zh:"- 具体通知的消息 schema 见 [Callback 协议](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)"}]},{name:"external_task_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Customized Task ID",zh:"自定义任务 ID"},notes:[{en:"- User-defined task ID. It will not override the system-generated task ID, but supports querying tasks by this ID",zh:"- 用户自定义任务 ID，传入不会覆盖系统生成的任务 ID，但支持通过该 ID 进行任务查询"},{en:"- Please note that it must be unique for each user",zh:"- 请注意，单用户下需要保证唯一性"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": {\n    "task_id": "string", // 任务ID，系统生成\n    "task_status": "string", // 任务状态，枚举值：submitted（已提交）、processing（处理中）、succeed（成功）、failed（失败）\n    "task_info":{ //任务创建时的参数信息\n   \t  "external_task_id": "string"//客户自定义任务ID\n  \t},\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, // 任务创建时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 //任务更新时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n  }\n}',en:'{\n  "code": 0, // Error codes;
```
